sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 39:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 39:1
items.html: The last phase is called Malchut because the authority that is extended from it is firm and in absolute control, as is the fear of the Kingship.
